title: Death Swap-Gmchange 死亡交換-遊戲模式切換
description:
Switch the player's mode to creative mode after a set time, and switch to survival mode after a set time.
與設定時間後將玩家的模式切換至創造模式，並在設定時間後切換至生存模式。
body:
> Stopped support. Deathswap v2.3 now has this function built-in. Please download [Death Swap](https://modrinth.com/datapack/deathswap)
停止支持，死亡交換v2.3現已內建此功能，請前往下載[死亡交換](https://modrinth.com/datapack/deathswap) # DeathSwap-Gamemode Change Expansion Pack
死亡交換-遊戲模式切換擴充包 Switch the player's mode to creative mode after a set time and switch to survival mode after a set time.
與設定時間後將玩家的模式切換至創造模式，並在設定時間後切換至生存模式。
## 下載 Download ● Datapack
● Fabric/Forge/Qutii (NeoForge is not supported)

Need Required 需要前置： DeathSwap 死亡交換 by vipvincent

Mod versions is the same as datapack, but it will automatically apply to all worlds, usually on servers.
If you don't want to apply to all worlds, please use datapack.
Fabric requires Fabric API, Quilt requires Quilted Fabric API
模組版本與資料包功能相同，但是會自動套用於所有世界，通常用於伺服器。
如果你不希望套用於所有世界，請使用資料包。
Fabric 需要 Fabric API，Quilt 需要 Quilted Fabric API
## License 協議 Please see the license in DeathSwap
請查看DeathSwap 死亡交換中的協議

您可以在任何模組包中自由使用此模組，只要下載內容仍然託管在 Modrinth 生態系統中。
You may freely use this mod in any modpack, as long as the download remains hosted within the Modrinth ecosystem.
